tip.verificationAgreementAcknowledgeTerms: I/We acknowledge that I/We have received, read, understood and agree to the following documents supplied by MM:
tip.verificationAgreementAgreeAcknowledgemen: I/We acknowledge that I/We have read, understood, and agree to the above acknowledgment.
tip.verificationAgreementConsentPassingInfo: I consent to MM passing my information to IDV service providers for the purpose of electronic identity verification. I confirm that I am authorised to provide the personal details presented, and I further consent to my information being checked with the document issuer or official record holder via third-party systems for the purpose of confirming my identity. I further consent to MM accessing and confirming my name, date of birth and address with a credit reporting agency (if applicable) for the purposes of undertaking an electronic identity verification.
tip.verificationAgreementElectronicIdentityV: To ensure us to verify your identity, MM Co Ltd may disclose personal information such as your name, date of birth, and address to a credit reporting agency (CRA) to obtain an assessment of whether that personal information matches information held by the CRA. The CRA may give us a report on that assessment and to do so may use personal information about you and other individuals in their files. Alternative means of verifying you are available on request. If we are unable to verify your identity using information held by a CRA we will provide you with a notice to this effect and give you the opportunity to contact the CRA to update your information held by them or verify your identity using an alternative method acceptable to us.
To ensure us to verify your identity,

may disclose personal information such as your name, date of birth, and address to a credit reporting agency (CRA) to obtain an assessment of whether that personal information matches information held by the CRA. The CRA may give us a report on that assessment and to do so may use personal information about you and other individuals in their files. Alternative means of verifying you are available on request. If we are unable to verify your identity using information held by a CRA we will provide you with a notice to this effect and give you the opportunity to contact the CRA to update your information held by them or verify your identity using an alternative method acceptable to us.
tip.verificationAgreementExclusive: By opening an account with MM Co Ltd, you agree that all matters relating to your access to, or use of, our website, client portal, or trading platform, including but not limited to accessing and using the trading account(s), the document(s) and/or conducting any transaction thereon (“such matters”), shall be governed by the laws of the British Virgin Islands, without regard to the conflicts of laws principles thereof.
tip.verificationAgreementNotConsentPassingIn: I do not consent to MM passing my information to IDV service providers for the purpose of electronic identity verification.
tip.verificationAgreementPrepareId: * Please be prepared to mail a certified copy of your valid Photo ID to your MM sales office.
tip.verificationAgreementSoleJurisdictionAck: You also irrevocably submit to the exclusive and sole jurisdiction of the courts of the British Virgin Islands with respect to such matters and irrevocably waive any and all rights to contest the said jurisdiction of the courts of the British Virgin Islands on any ground including but not limited to the ground of forum non convenient. Further, you hereby irrevocably waive any and all rights to commence any action, proceedings or counterclaim on such matters against MM Co Ltd and/or any related party in any jurisdiction other than the courts of the British Virgin Islands.

tip.verificationQ1: Do you understand the concepts of margin and leverage and how they apply to this trading account, which means that when you trade Margin FX or derivatives, you could lose more than your initial deposit as losses can exceed deposits, and you may have to make further payments?
tip.verificationQ2: Do you understand how the concepts of market liquidity and volatility apply to this trading account, which means that certain market circumstances may impact prices offered, MM’s ability to generate prices, or MM’s ability to execute orders?
tip.verificationQ3: Do you understand the nature of derivative trading which means that the prices are based on the price of the underlying instruments or assets, and you do not own or have any rights to the underlying assets?
tip.verificationQ4: Do you understand it is your responsibility to monitor and manage the risk of trading and your trading account? The products offered are traded on an online platform or trading facility, which means you need to be familiar with operating MM’s MetaTrader online trading platform, such as but not limited to how to open and close positions?

jpAgreement.check1: When applying to open an account for Internet transactions, we will provide you with the 'Transaction Manual' and 'Transaction Terms and Conditions' for the desired transaction, which are documents to be delivered before the conclusion of the contract, by electromagnetic means (on our website), and regarding the same transaction. jpAgreement.check2: Do you fully understand that over-the-counter foreign exchange margin trading involves risks disclosed in the pre-contract delivery document ('Over-the-Counter Foreign Exchange Margin Trading Explanation'), such as exchange rate fluctuation risk, interest rate fluctuation risk, liquidity risk, credit risk, leverage effect risk, automatic settlement (loss-cut rule) risk, loss-limiting orders (stop-loss orders) risk, risks due to the establishment or amendment of related laws, regulations, and tax systems, and risks due to changes in margin, fees, and swap points?
jpAgreement.check3Title: About the Magnitude of the Risk
jpAgreement.check3: Do you fully understand that over-the-counter foreign exchange margin trading is not a principal-guaranteed product, and that losses greater than the deposited margin may occur?
jpAgreement.check4: Do you fully understand that our company adopts an automatic settlement (loss-cut rule), which will settle some or all of the open positions without your instruction if the effective margin (net asset value) in your trading account falls below a certain ratio of the required margin?
jpAgreement.check5: Do you fully understand that after a withdrawal request is received from your trading account, it may not be possible to withdraw the requested amount due to the occurrence of new valuation losses or other factors?
jpAgreement.check6: After thoroughly reading our company's privacy policy, do you agree to the collection of your personal information by our company?
jpAgreement.check7: I confirm that after reviewing the above contents, I agree to conduct over-the-counter foreign exchange margin trading at my (or our company's) own discretion and responsibility.

tradeRebateStatus.4: Skipped with open close time less than 1 minute

wholesale.channelThreeQ1: 1. What post graduate qualifications related to the understanding of Margin FX, CFDs over indices, commodities, currencies, metals and shares do you possess ?
wholesale.channelThreeQ2: 2. What courses related to the understanding of Margin FX, CFDs over indices, commodities, currencies, metals and shares have you taken? Please list the name of the institution that provided the course as well.

wholesale.finishContent_1: Thank you for submitting documents related to your Wholesale Account Application. Once we have received your documents, we will let you know the outcome of your application within 7 business days.
wholesale.finishContent_2_1: If you have any further questions regarding the Wholesale accounts, please contact us via online chat or email us at
wholesale.finishContent_2_2: We look forward to providing you with the best service in the CFD industry.
wholesale.finishContent_3: To register as a MM Pro via the Wealth Threshold application you need to:
wholesale.finishContent_4: Have net assets of at least AUD$2.5M
wholesale.finishContent_5: Has a gross income for each of the last 2 financial years of at least AUD $250,000.
wholesale.finishContent_6_1: You will need an eligible member of a professional accounting body to complete the
wholesale.finishContent_6_2: form, certifying you are a wholesale client. The Certificate must be dated within one month of the Wealth Threshold Application.
wholesale.finishContent_7_1: Please email a scanned image of the completed certificate to
wholesale.finishContent_7_2: Please post the original Certificate to MM’S office at:
wholesale.finishContent_8:
MM Co Ltd
Suite 18.03, Level 18, 201 Elizabeth Street
Sydney, NSW 2000
wholesale.riskContent_1: If you qualify to be a wholesale client as a Sophisticated Investor, you will no longer be entitled to certain protections afforded to retail clients under the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth). These include, but may not be limited to:
wholesale.riskContent_10: I have read and understood that by electing to be a MM Wholesale Client I will lose some protections afforded by ASIC to retail clients and I accept the consequences of this.
wholesale.riskContent_12: I certify that I do genuinely believe I have the experience and knowledge required to be able to understand the risks and product features associated with CFD trading.
wholesale.riskContent_14: I have the experience and capacity to make investment decisions without the benefit of regulated disclosure documents issued to retail clients in accordance with the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth).
wholesale.riskContent_15: I have satisfied myself that I understand the legal and financial implications of being a Sophisticated Investor.
wholesale.riskContent_16: I understand that, in being classified as a wholesale client, certain protections applicable to retail clients will not apply to
wholesale.riskContent_17: I understand and accept that MM may withdraw my status as a wholesale client, and treat me as a retail client, at any time at its absolute discretion.
wholesale.riskContent_19: MM has not given me a Product Disclosure Statement;
wholesale.riskContent_2: Appropriateness: As a wholesale client you acknowledge that you have the necessary levels of experience and knowledge to transact in CFDs with MM. We may therefore assume that you have the necessary level of experience and knowledge to understand the risks involved where we assess whether a product or service is appropriate for you.
wholesale.riskContent_20: MM has not given me any other document that would be required to be given to me under the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) if the product or service were provided to a retail client; and
wholesale.riskContent_21: MM does not have any other obligation to me under the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) that MM would have if the product or service were provided to a retail client.
wholesale.riskContent_22: I acknowledge that I have read and, should I be approved as a wholesale client, I agree to be bound by:
wholesale.riskContent_23: the Wholesale Client Disclosure Notice; and
wholesale.riskContent_24: the MM Terms and Conditions; and
wholesale.riskContent_25: any other document that may be issued to me from time to time.
wholesale.riskContent_26:
I understand and agree that any open positions I hold will be treated as wholesale effective from the date of my wholesale classification.

If there are any inconsistencies between the Terms and Conditions and the Wholesale Client Disclosure Notice, the Wholesale Client Disclosure Notice will take precedence.

I declare that all information I have provided to MM as part of my submission is complete, accurate and is not misleading in any way.

I agree to notify MM as soon as possible if my circumstances change in a way which may reasonably impact my ability to meet the minimum standards set out by MM for wholesale classification.

By clicking 'Submit Application', I understand that MM Co Ltd (MM) will treat this as a written request from me to be treated as a wholesale client.
wholesale.riskContent_3: Disclosures: Retail client disclosure documents such as the Product Disclosure Statement and Financial Services Guide or any other disclosure that is offered to retail clients in accordance with the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) will not apply to you. Where these have already been provided to you, those documents will no longer apply to you.
wholesale.riskContent_4: Risks and other important information are detailed in the
wholesale.riskContent_5: Communications: As a wholesale client, we may consider your trading expertise and use more sophisticated language than when communicating with retail clients.
wholesale.riskContent_6: Dispute Resolution: We are not required under the Corporations Act 2001 (Cth) to provide wholesale clients with access to our Internal Dispute Resolution process, but we will still make this service available to you at no cost. While you can still access the external dispute resolution provider Australian Financial Complaints Authority (‘AFCA’), you may be treated differently given your status as an experienced wholesale investor and your matter may be excluded at AFCA’s discretion.
wholesale.riskContent_7: Negative balance protection: Your losses can exceed deposits and you will not be entitled to retail negative account balance protection. However, MM may use its discretion to grant you a single negative balance protection of up to AUD$10,000.
wholesale.riskContent_8: Margin close-out: MM will close out your position(s) if your equity falls below 50% of the required margin.
wholesale.riskContent_9: Leverage limitations: Any regulated retail leverage ratios will not apply to you and as a wholesale client you will be able to access wholesale leverage ratios.
wholesale.riskTitle_2: You will waive some protections as a MM Wholesale Client
wholesale.startContent_1: To register as a MM Pro via the Wealth Threshold application you need to:
wholesale.startContent_10: Demonstrate your product knowledge by completing our short, online Knowledge Quiz (90% pass mark);
wholesale.startContent_11: Traded at least 75 trades with a firm for Margin FX, CFDs over Indices, Commodities, Currencies, Metals and Shares over the previous 12 months, or Traded at least 50 significant trades with a firm for Margin FX, CFDs over Indices, Commodities, Currencies, Metals and Shares over the previous 12 months;
wholesale.startContent_12: Work or have worked in the financial sector for at least one year in a professional position which requires knowledge of leveraged derivative trading (and provide evidence of such employment position);
wholesale.startContent_13: Possess formal qualifications relevant to the understanding of Margin FX, CFDs over indices, commodities, currencies, metals and shares. Post graduate qualifications are preferred (e.g. a course or major in Finance or Applied Finance).
wholesale.startContent_14: Please note that once you click “Apply for Upgrade” you can not Go Back to begin a new or different application.
wholesale.startContent_2: Have net assets of at least AUD$2.5M
wholesale.startContent_3: Has a gross income for each of the last 2 financial years of at least AUD $250,000.
wholesale.startContent_4: You will need an eligible member of a professional accounting body to complete the
wholesale.startContent_5: form, certifying you are a wholesale client. The Certificate must be dated within one month of the Wealth Threshold Application.
wholesale.startContent_6: Please email a scanned image of the completed certificate to
wholesale.startContent_7: Please post the original Certificate to MM’S office at:
wholesale.startContent_9: To register as a MM Pro via the Sophisticated Investor application you must satisfy one of the three below options:
wholesale.startTitle_1: Please select one of the following ways to prove your qualifications.
wholesale.testContent_1: To register as a MM Pro via the Sophisticated Investor Test you will need to apply through one of the following channels:
wholesale.testContent_13: Possess formal qualifications relevant to the understanding of Margin FX, CFDs over indices, commodities, currencies, metals and shares. Post graduate qualifications are preferred (e.g. a course or major in Finance or Applied Finance).
wholesale.testContent_2: Demonstrate your product knowledge by completing our short, online Knowledge Quiz (90% pass mark)
wholesale.testContent_3: Traded at least 75 trades[1] with a firm for Margin FX, CFDs over Indices, Commodities, Currencies, Metals and Shares over the previous 12 months, or Traded at least 50 significant trades[2] with a firm for Margin FX, CFDs over Indices, Commodities, Currencies, Metals and Shares over the previous 12 months
wholesale.testContent_7: [1] A trade means opening a position with a broker.
wholesale.testContent_8: [2] A significant trade means opening a position of A$25,000 notional size for CFD shares or A$50,000 for Margin FX, CFDs over Indices, Commodities, Currencies and Metals
wholesale.testContent_9: Work or have worked in the financial sector for at least one year in a professional position which requires knowledge of leveraged derivative trading (and provide evidence of such employment position)
wholesale.finishContent_2: If you have any further questions about wholesale accounts, please contact us through online chat or email us at wholesale@midasmkts.com. We look forward to providing you with the best service in the CFD industry.
wholesale.finishContent_6: You need to have the Qualified Accountant Certificate completed by a accredited professional accounting firm member to confirm you are a wholesale customer. The certificate must be dated within one month of applying for the wealth threshold.
wholesale.finishContent_7: Please send the scanned image of the completed certificate to wholesale@midasmkts.com. Please mail the original certificate to the MM office address:
wholesale.startContent_8: MM Co LtdLevel 24, 171 Sussex StreetSydney, NSW 2000
